judges.name: Hon. Hugh Harrison
judges.notes: GTA V canon — judge on Fame or Shame. Theatrical but tends to go easy on defendants.

judges.name: Hon. Barry Griffin
judges.notes: GTA IV canon — Liberty City. Sentenced Billy Grey to country club rehab; known for lenient dispositions.

judges.name: Hon. Grady
judges.notes: GTA IV canon — host of Just or Unjust on WKTT. Harsh, unpredictable rulings.

judges.name: Hon. K. Martinez
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. By-the-book, slight lean toward prosecution.

judges.name: Hon. S. Alvarez
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Rehabilitation-focused, gives second chances.

judges.name: Hon. D. Whitaker
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Tough on repeat offenders and drug cases.

judges.name: Hon. T. Ellison
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Fair, weighs mitigating factors heavily.

judges.name: Hon. M. Chen
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Neutral; lets evidence speak.

judges.name: Hon. R. Bennett
judges.notes: Blaine County Circuit. Rural court veteran; tough on property crime.

judges.name: Hon. J. Monroe
judges.notes: Blaine County Circuit. Community-minded; prefers probation over jail when possible.

judges.name: Hon. P. Gaines
judges.notes: Blaine County Circuit. Straight shooter; moderate sentencing.

judges.name: Hon. V. Cross
judges.notes: Blaine County Circuit. Former PD; sympathetic to defendants with clean records.

judges.name: Hon. I. Navarro
judges.notes: San Andreas Territorial Tribunal. Federal docket; strict on organized crime and trafficking.

judges.name: Hon. V. Reese
judges.notes: San Andreas Territorial Tribunal. Transferred from Liberty City; known for plea leniency.

judges.name: Hon. L. Torres
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Newer to the bench; cautious and procedural.

judges.name: Hon. F. Okonkwo
judges.notes: Los Santos Superior Court. Reform advocate; lowest sentences in the district.
